swiftor.name: Newspaper Sub Assistant Agent
swiftor.description: An end-to-end AI automation platform that transforms international news content for Bengali audiences. The system extracts articles from any URL, translates with cultural context preservation, and generates publication-ready formatted content in seconds.
features: Context-aware Bengali translation preserving journalistic nuance
Dual format generation (Hard News / Soft News)
Per-user quota management with token tracking
swiftor.challenge: A news publication needed to process international articles for Bengali audiences. Manual workflow took 2-3 hours per article with inconsistent quality, limiting daily output to 5-8 articles.
swiftor.solution: Built Swiftor - an AI pipeline that extracts, translates, and formats articles in 10-15 seconds. Result: 10x content volume, 99% time reduction, 100% standardized formatting.

research-bot.name: Multi-Tool Research Bot
research-bot.description: A stateful AI research assistant built on LangGraph's directed graph architecture. The system implements a 3-node state machine (conversation_manager → context_llm → enhanced_tools) with intelligent model routing, automatic fallback chains, and tool result caching. Uses Groq's LLaMA 3.3-70B as primary inference with cascading fallbacks to ensure reliability.
features: LangGraph state machine with conditional tool routing
Task-optimized model selection (reasoning, math, coding, analysis)
ArXiv paper search (10 results, 10K char summaries)
Tavily + DuckDuckGo web search with caching
Safe math expression evaluation via custom calculator tool
File generator for CSV, JSON, Python, Markdown exports
Conversation history trimming with topic-based summarization
research-bot.challenge: Building a reliable agentic system that gracefully handles LLM rate limits, tool failures, and maintains conversation context across multi-turn research sessions without losing state.
research-bot.solution: Implemented a LangGraph-based architecture with ConversationState TypedDict managing messages, tool caches, and error counts. Added EnhancedLLM class with automatic model switching based on failure cooldowns and task-type routing (e.g., math queries → primary model, reasoning → secondary). Tool results are cached to prevent redundant API calls.

license-plate.name: AR License Plate Detection
license-plate.tagline: Real-Time Computer Vision for Vehicle Identification
license-plate.description: A computer vision system for detecting and recognizing license plates in real-time video streams. Built for a client project with specific accuracy requirements for Bangladeshi license plate formats.
features: Real-time license plate detection from video feeds
OCR for character recognition on detected plates
license-plate.challenge: Client needed automated vehicle identification for security monitoring with high accuracy on Bangladeshi license plate formats.
license-plate.solution: Developed a YOLO-based detection system with custom OCR pipeline achieving 95%+ accuracy at 30 FPS processing speed.
